title: release metadata rebind v6
outOfScope: source code, tests, CI, and governance policy changes
publishing, tagging, and provider release operations
adopter project files or installation outputs

sources.reason: Release sequencing and required Work Item lifecycle.
Closed predecessor and bounded archive budget window.

riskAssessment.reason: Regenerate and verify only the canonical release metadata after the predecessor process correction is closed.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the complete lifecycle and release only after this metadata Work Item closes.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The three canonical release metadata files are regenerated from the merged default branch and remain mutually consistent.
Release preflight, supply-chain evidence, and source-bound identity checks pass without changing adopter files.
The complete Finish Gate, PR, merge, ai-close-work-item, branch cleanup, and default-base synchronization evidence is recorded before publication.
guidelines: Use the canonical finalizer output; do not hand-edit release metadata.
Do not publish or tag until this Work Item is archived, merged, and closed.

intent.problem: The release metadata candidate must be rebound to the newest default branch only after the bounded budget/process correction has closed.
constraints: This is the template repository, not an adopter project.
The predecessor release_metadata_rebind_v6_budget is closed at PR #284 before this Work Item starts.
Publishing and tagging are out of scope until after this Work Item closes.
intent.rationale: Keep release identity generation as a separate, reviewable metadata Work Item while eliminating the unnecessary separate budget Work Item pattern.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the final release metadata Work Item and publication sequence after full lifecycle closure.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: metadata files are generated from the newest default-base commit
adopter project and publication remain out of scope

rawUserRequest: 预算流程问题先根治；预算工单不单独拆分；完成最终元数据工单的完整 Contract/Preflight/PR/合并/ai-close-work-item 后再发布。

declaredIntent.summary: Regenerate final release metadata after the merged bounded budget-window correction.
